summary: Tested enhanced product form features, ProductCard trust signals, and mobile chat. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Create product with SKU field
Backend: Create product with nutritional info (9 fields: calories, protein, carbs, sugars, fat, saturated_fat, fiber, sodium, salt)
Backend: Create product with packs configuration
Backend: Create product with flavor field
Backend: Create product with all new fields combined
Backend: Products API returns trust signals (average_rating, review_count, units_sold)
Backend: Products show 0 when no reviews/sales data
Backend: Categories API returns 7 categories for product form
Frontend: Producer login and dashboard access
Frontend: Create Product form - Basic Info section (Name, SKU, Category, Description, Price, Country, Flavor)
Frontend: Create Product form - Images section with upload
Frontend: Create Product form - Packs section with Add Pack button
Frontend: Create Product form - Pack discount calculation (-17% for Pack of 6, -25% for Pack of 12)
Frontend: Create Product form - Ingredients section with Add Ingredient button
Frontend: Create Product form - Nutritional Info section (9 fields)
Frontend: Create Product form - Allergens section with 14 selection buttons
Frontend: Create Product form - Certifications section with 8 selection buttons
Frontend: ProductCard trust signals show rating, reviews, and sales
Frontend: ProductCard shows '0.0 (0 reviews) · 0 sold' when no data
Frontend: Mobile chat is full screen (390x844)
Frontend: Mobile chat shows recommended products at TOP in horizontal scroll
Frontend: Mobile chat product cards are compact with image, name, price, and add to cart button
critical_code_review_comments: Product form is well-structured with collapsible sections
Pack discount calculation is automatic and displays correctly
Allergen and certification buttons use toggle selection pattern
Mobile chat layout properly shows products at top before messages
seed_data_creation: Created test products with SKU, nutritional info, packs, and flavor fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhanced product form features are working: SKU, nutritional info (9 fields), packs with automatic discount calculation, allergens (14 buttons), certifications (8 buttons). ProductCard trust signals show 0 when no data. Mobile chat is full screen with products at top.

product_card_trust_signals.details: Shows rating, review count, and units sold. Displays 0 when no data.

mobile_chat.details: Full screen (390x844), products at top in horizontal scroll, compact product cards
